title: Tanmicoshomy Dark Brown Wood Framed Arched Bathroom Mirror 24x36 Inch, Wooden Wall Mirror for Living Room, Bedroom or Entryway
features: Solid Wood Frame Mirror: This wood bathroom mirror is made of premium wood, and its natural grain is full of rustic chic charm and farmhouse warmth, making it a great addition to brighten up your house in the bathroom, bedroom, living room, entryway, or anywhere. Due to the color of the wood itself, there may be a slight color difference when purchasing 2 pieces at the same time.

Clear Images: Our wood bathroom mirrors are made from 3mm tempered glass, HD imaging, beautiful, natural and no distortion，perfect for bathroom vanity.Bring light-reflecting brightness to a dark corner or visually enhance the size of a small room.

Striking Arch Design with 24x36 Inch Overall Frame​ This wall mirror features a timeless arch silhouette with an overall frame size of 24 inches wide by 36 inches tall—perfectly proportioned to make a statement without overwhelming your space. Please measure your wall space carefully before purchasing to ensure this 24x36 inch size fits your intended area.
Easy to install: It comes with pre -installed D rings hooks on the back, you can hang it easily. Measure your space before choosing the size.

Professional Packaging：We understand the importance of packaging for wall mirrors,so in the past year, we have undergone three packaging renovations.The packaging of this wood mirror has been carefully designed to protect the mirror with all-round protection styrofoam,which passed drop and impact test.
description: Product description Tanmicoshomy Dark Brown Wood Framed Arched Bathroom Mirror 24x36 Inch, Wooden Wall Mirror for Living Room, Bedroom or Entryway Safety Warning Warning: This product contains glass which can break and cause injury. Always use appropriate safety measures when handling, installing, or disposing of this product. Ensure the mirror is securely mounted to the wall to prevent it from falling and causing harm.
